scripts.clean: pnpm hardhat clean && rimraf artifacts cache .turbo
scripts.deploy:staging:sepolia: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id staging_ethereum-sepolia --verify --network sepolia ignition/modules/CurvyAggregatorAlpha.ts
scripts.deploy:staging:arbitrum: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id staging_arbitrum --verify --network arbitrum ignition/modules/CurvyAggregatorAlpha.ts
scripts.deploy:production:sepolia: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id production_ethereum-sepolia --verify --network sepolia ignition/modules/CurvyAggregatorAlpha.ts
scripts.deploy:production:arbitrum: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id production_arbitrum --verify --network arbitrum ignition/modules/CurvyAggregatorAlpha.ts
scripts.deploy:portals:arbitrum: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id portals-testing --verify --network arbitrum ignition/modules/CurvyAggregatorAlpha.ts
scripts.deploy:airlock-factory:ethereum: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id airlock_factory_ethereum-testing --verify --network ethereum ignition/modules/AirlockFactory.ts
scripts.deploy:airlock-factory:arbitrum: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id airlock_factory_arbitrum-testing --verify --network arbitrum ignition/modules/AirlockFactory.ts
